headline: 新片乏力，经典IP热度不减
headlineEn: New Films Slow, Classic IPs Stay Hot
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周仅一部新片。热门趋势中《痴迷》《福尔摩斯小姐3》领跑，多部续集与衍生剧受关注。
summaryEn: No movies released today, only one new this week. Trending top: 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3', with many sequels and spin-offs drawing attention.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片仅一部，市场清淡
industryHighlights.en: Only one new movie this week, market quiet

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》列本周趋势第四
industryHighlights.en: The Devil Wears Prada 2 ranks 4th in weekly trends

industryHighlights.text: 多部续集和衍生剧占据本周热门
industryHighlights.en: Multiple sequels and spin-offs dominate this week's trends

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》等未来大片蓄势待发
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming blockbusters like Avatar: The Last Airbender are on the horizon
